title: Horror.Place Resurrection Profile
description: Contract for resurrectionProfile objects attached to mood, event, seed, and persona contracts.

originId.description: Canonical ID of the ancestor contract being resurrected (seed/event/mood/persona).

originKind.description: Object kind of the ancestor contract.

resurrectionKind.description: High-level transformation pattern applied to the ancestor.

novelty.description: Target novelty bands and drift expectations relative to origin.

minDrift.description: Minimum normalized drift distance required vs origin (0=same, 1=maximal change).

maxDrift.description: Maximum normalized drift distance permitted vs origin for this resurrection.

cloneBandThreshold.description: Distance threshold below which a candidate is considered a near-clone and must be rejected.

invariantDeltas.description: Target shifts in invariant bands relative to origin contract.

rotateDir.description: Whether the resurrection must rotate the haunt vector direction vs origin.

minRotationDeg.description: Minimum rotation of HVF direction to apply (in degrees).

requireTopologyChange.description: Require LSG class/topology to change (e.g., new liminal corridors).

metricTargets.description: Desired changes to entertainment metrics and safety caps for this resurrection.

DET.description: Hard cap on DET for any single resurrection run.

CDL.description: Hard cap on CDL for any single resurrection run.

sessionContributionMax.description: Maximum cumulative metric impact per session for this resurrection profile.

pacing.description: Constraints on how often and where this resurrection may be invoked.

maxPerSession.description: Maximum number of times this profile may be used per session.

cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum time between resurrections of this originId in the same session.

allowedTileClasses.description: Tile classes this resurrection is allowed to target; used to shift topology for DreadForge-style moods.

telemetry.description: Telemetry hooks and thresholds for resurrection monitoring.

coolingOffThreshold.description: Resurrection count after which the profile should auto-cool or mutate.

qualityThresholds.description: Minimum quality thresholds for accepting this resurrection in CI and runtime.

minResurrectionQuality.description: Minimum resurrectionQuality score required for promotion.

minMetricGainUEC.description: Optional minimum net UEC delta over ancestor runs.

requireARRIncreaseOnResolved.description: Require higher ARR than ancestor for previously resolved storylines.

deltaBand.description: Target delta band relative to ancestor.

requireChange.description: If true, candidate must differ from origin by at least this band.

metricDeltaBand.description: Target metric delta band relative to ancestor runs.

metricBand.description: Absolute target metric band for resurrected content.
